privileged_info_summary: This task creates a warranty tracking spreadsheet for 5 household appliances (Refrigerator, Dishwasher, Washing Machine, Microwave, Water Heater) with purchase dates from 2020-2024 and warranty periods of 12, 24, 36, or 120 months. The task requires implementing formulas to calculate warranty expiration dates using EDATE or DATE+MONTH functions, days remaining using TODAY() subtraction, and status categorization using nested IF statements. A minimum of 4 out of 6 verification criteria must be met (70% pass threshold) to complete the task. The data is synthetic, created during task setup. Expected expiration dates are: Refrigerator 2025-01-15, Dishwasher 2023-08-20, Washing Machine 2027-03-10, Microwave 2022-11-05, Water Heater 2030-06-18.
